channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
item.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the S...

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints â more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: The U.S. seizes another oil tanker as peace talks with Iran remain in limbo
item.description: The seizure comes after President Trump told Fox News Wednesday that there was "no time pressure" on the ceasefire with Iran, which he has extended in...

item.title: South African court orders Zambia to return former president's body
item.description: Zambia authorities and Edgar Lungu's family are in a dispute over where the former leader's remains should be buried.

item.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
item.description: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.

item.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
item.description: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

item.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
item.description: Reports say Phelan, whose role was largely administrative, left amid tension over US shipbuilding.

item.title: What are today's HELOC and home equity loan interest rates?
item.description: HELOCs and home equity loans offer homeowners an affordable way to borrow money now. Here are the rates for each.

item.title: How Big Brothers Big Sisters has helped provide opportunity, mentorship to millions
item.description: In the series "USA to Z," "CBS Mornings" looks at how the nonprofit Big Brothers Big Sisters of America has provided opportunities and mentorship for ...

item.title: What is the price of silver today?
item.description: Silver can play a critical role in a diversified portfolio. Here's how much it costs per ounce right now.

item.title: "A breaking point": Inside the 68-day DHS shutdown
item.description: In a department built to respond to catastrophic threats, employees have been reduced to bartering for office supplies.

item.title: BBC visits migrant camp in northern France as new deal announced
item.description: A proposed three-year deal with Paris is aimed at stopping migrants crossing the Channel on small boats.

item.title: What are today's mortgage and mortgage refinance interest rates?
item.description: Knowing today's mortgage rates can help new homebuyers and homeowners looking to lock in a good deal.
